yt_title: Info Diet & Investment Stories (Warren Buffett, David Senra)

business_ideas.idea: Triple Whale: mobile dashboard for ecom store analytics across all channels
Paper Scraper: AI system to filter and summarize 5000 daily scientific papers
Spin Out GPT: LLM interface to query research papers for commercialization potential
Alpha Signals: AI newsletter of scientific papers curated by top researcher activity
Lacrosse league investment: professional sports league built from grassroots
Presidential reality show: Survivor-style candidate selection via competence challenges

predictions.text: More charismatic candidates tend to win elections regardless of qualifications
Investing requires different discipline than entrepreneurship (wait vs action)
Diversified portfolios from core business often outperform the main business itself
